body_redacted_reason: private memory bodies, raw transcripts, live user-memory values, hidden trigger text, provider payloads, and credential-equivalent material are excluded; copied macro memory-plane source bodies live under source_modules/ and receipts carry refs, hashes, counts, and verdicts only
description: Public memory-security policy refactor for sleeper-memory poisoning with copied non-secret macro memory-plane bodies: validates provenance-bound write proposals, quarantine verdicts, retrieval influence gates, rollback audit refs, cold rerun receipts, source module digests, and negative cases without exporting private memory bodies.
